message:
perf(cli): move --version and theme validation before logging init

Reorder main_impl() startup sequence so that the cheapest exit paths
run before any expensive initialization:

1. Parse CLI args (already fast — clap derive)
2. Validate theme file paths (filesystem stat, no allocations)
3. Handle --version (print and exit immediately)
4. Initialize tracing subscriber (allocates, sets up env filter)
5. Build async runtime and run application

This makes 'pi --version' measurably faster by skipping tracing_subscriber
initialization entirely. Theme path validation is extracted into a
standalone validate_theme_path_spec() function for testability, keeping
the async run() function focused on application logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
